productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Adizero Shadow Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteScore those winning baskets in style with the adidas Adizero Shadow Basketball shoe. Constructed for ultra-quick performance and with absolute lightweight comfort, these shoes are poised to set you soaring.Product DetailsSynthetic upper for maximum durability and lightweight comfort High ankle for snug support to the lower leg Synthetic overlay at the back heel for enhanced back-foot protection and support Perforations on the forefoot, heel and midfoot for ventilation Meshed, padded tongue and collar for absolute breathable and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded foot-bed for all day cushioned comfortDurable non-marking TPU outsole with circular patterned grooves and herringbone grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Horizontal wave-like grooves on the medial forefoot and lateral heel for enhanced ease of movement and stabilityTorsion system in the midfoot to support the inner arch and improve forefoot motion control in both linear and lateral movement Material and careSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
